chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-291 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag `A` 2. For hearing of main case 24-04-2024 Syed Zafar Ali Shah, Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Sawan Khan Jagirani, Advocate for respondent No.3 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Petitioner claims to be a Tubewell Chowkidar BPS-2, in the office of Executive Engineer, Ghotki Tubewell Division Ghotki, has filed this petition seeking directions to the respondents to release his salary. Muneer Ahmed Soomro, Executive Engineer Gohtoki Tubewell Division Ghotki is present, has filed comments and submits that the appointment order on the basis of which the petitioner has filed this petition is fake and there is no record of his appointment. In view of such factual controversy and denial of petitioner’s appointment, we are of the view that this petition lacks merits and is accordingly dismissed. However, petitioner is at liberty to avail a remedy, if any, in accordance with law, if he has any case to establish his appointment. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
